why_required: The universe must include failed and delisted biotech issuers or the investment-mode curve is survivor-biased.
The 180-day basket needs adjusted daily prices to handle splits and corporate actions.
The system must know when each security became tradable.
The system must know when each security stopped being tradable and why.
Splits and mergers must not create artificial returns.
The tradable universe must be reconstructable at each historical date.
ETFs warrants ADRs preferred shares and non-common securities must be filtered consistently.
The biotech universe and liquidity filters need primary exchange context.
The lab must be allowed to retain derived reports without raw payload leakage.
